arts.ttl: Ryan Reynolds dealt transfer blow as Gary Neville tells Prem star not to join Wrexham
arts.sum: Wrexham are one of the clubs who have been linked with a move for Leicester City striker Jamie Vardy, but Gary Neville has suggested he should stay put at the King Power Stadium

arts.ttl: Monday's League One predictions including Blackpool vs. Wrexham
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's League One fixtures, including Blackpool vs. Wrexham.

Blackpool might be six points behind the playoffs, but their game in hand means they remain very much in the picture. But the Seasiders will most likely have to win all of their four remaining games ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Blackpool vs. Wrexham - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League One clash between Blackpool and Wrexham, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
